# Documentation

## components

- [Buttons](https://docs.swmansion.com/react-native-gesture-handler/docs/components/buttons)
- [Pressable](https://docs.swmansion.com/react-native-gesture-handler/docs/components/pressable)
- [Reanimated Drawer Layout](https://docs.swmansion.com/react-native-gesture-handler/docs/components/reanimated-drawer-layout)
- [Reanimated Swipeable](https://docs.swmansion.com/react-native-gesture-handler/docs/components/reanimated_swipeable)
- [Touchable](https://docs.swmansion.com/react-native-gesture-handler/docs/components/touchable)
- [Legacy Touchables](https://docs.swmansion.com/react-native-gesture-handler/docs/components/touchables)

- [Integration with Animated](https://docs.swmansion.com/react-native-gesture-handler/docs/fundamentals/animated-interactions)

- [Gesture Detectors](https://docs.swmansion.com/react-native-gesture-handler/docs/fundamentals/gesture-detector)
